mapper.select: SELECT user_id, username, password, nickname, status, is_deleted FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT r.role_code FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = '0' AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.role_code IS NOT NULL AND r.role_code != ''

SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON rp.role_id = r.role_id INNER JOIN sys_permission p ON p.permission_id = rp.permission_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = '0' AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND p.status = '0' AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND p.permission_code IS NOT NULL AND p.permission_code != ''
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET last_login_ip = #{loginIp}, last_login_time = NOW(), login_count = IFNULL(login_count, 0) + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user ( user_id, username, password, nickname, email, status, is_deleted, create_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email}, '0', 0, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM sys_user WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{newPassword}, update_time = NOW() WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 0
